title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Gateway Distriparks

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Gateway Distriparks
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gateway Distriparks family as a Logistics Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gateway Distriparks:
Gateway Distriparks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gateway Distriparks!
